name: Silver Loop Taper Candle Holder - Threshold™
description:
Style your home with elegance using this Loop Taper Candle Holder from Threshold™. Made of metal, this candle holder is designed in the shape of a swirling loop in a silver-tone finish for an eye-catching display. Compatible with tapered candles, this candle holder can hold two candles at a time to cast a warm glow. Place it on your living room console or entryway table to brighten up your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
